integration_evidence.summary: App build copies Lode registry/sites JSON assets into dist-electron/lode.
Runtime supervisor validates Lode assets and includes them in live runtime readiness; Core launch receives asset env only when ready.
Packaged Electron smoke reaches live_ready using temporary local Core/Harbor health endpoints and packaged Lode build-output assets only.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: This App batch packages local Lode JSON assets and produces local packaged smoke evidence; it does not change Core/Harbor/Lode contracts or operate real external accounts/pages.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and closeout must not treat packaged smoke as live Xiaohongshu/BOSS production evidence.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Before PR creation or after any code/carrier diff.
